subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Remember thy Lord, then stand thou steadfast before Him, and in all matters place thy trust in Him, for verily He watcheth over thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله اذکری ربک ثم اقنتی له و توکلی فی کل الامور علیه انه کان علیک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions
